context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Amazon order fetching with the right filters, internal order mapping with correct field names, idempotent import logic using external order IDs, Walmart order acknowledgment with required headers and 4-hour SLA awareness, and a monitor that alerts at 2 hours.

checklist.name: Amazon order status filter
checklist.description: Amazon order fetch filters by OrderStatuses=Unshipped,PartiallyShipped (not all statuses)

checklist.name: Amazon MFN channel filter
checklist.description: Amazon order fetch filters by FulfillmentChannels=MFN (Merchant Fulfilled Network)

checklist.name: Internal order channel field
checklist.description: Mapped Amazon orders include channel: 'amazon' in the internal order representation

checklist.name: Internal order externalId field
checklist.description: Mapped Amazon orders use externalId set to the AmazonOrderId value

checklist.name: Deduplication by externalId
checklist.description: Polling logic checks if an order with the same external ID already exists before importing it

checklist.name: Queue jobId deduplication
checklist.description: Orders are enqueued with a jobId derived from the marketplace order ID to prevent duplicate queue entries

checklist.name: Poll interval 5 minutes
checklist.description: Polling is designed to run every 5 minutes (comment, cron expression, or interval value of 5 * 60 * 1000 or similar)

checklist.name: Last-polled timestamp tracking
checklist.description: Poller stores and retrieves a last-polled timestamp to use as CreatedAfter/equivalent parameter in subsequent polls

checklist.name: Walmart WM_QOS.CORRELATION_ID header
checklist.description: Walmart acknowledgment request includes WM_QOS.CORRELATION_ID header populated with a UUID (e.g., crypto.randomUUID())

checklist.name: Walmart Basic auth header
checklist.description: Walmart acknowledgment uses Authorization: Basic with base64-encoded client_id:client_secret

checklist.name: Walmart 4-hour acknowledgment SLA
checklist.description: Code comments or PIPELINE_NOTES.md reference the 4-hour acknowledgment requirement for Walmart orders

checklist.name: Walmart 2-hour unacknowledged alert
checklist.description: Monitor triggers an alert if a Walmart order has not been acknowledged within 2 hours (not 4 hours)

checklist.name: Automated Walmart acknowledgment
checklist.description: Walmart acknowledgment logic is automated (not dependent on manual fulfillment action to trigger)
